---
title: ""
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(readr)
library(plotly)
library(adehabitatHR)

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

kaudulla_elephants_clean_imputed <- read_csv("kaudulla_elephants_clean_imputed.csv")

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
df_sf <- kaudulla_elephants_clean_imputed |>
  filter(!is.na(lon), !is.na(lat)) |>
  st_as_sf(
    coords = c("lon", "lat"),
    crs = 4326
  )


```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
df_sf_trans <- st_transform(df_sf, 32644)
df_sp <- as(df_sf_trans, "Spatial")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 35
#| fig-height: 70
#| out-width: "100%"

g3 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = df_sf,
    color = "darkblue",
    size = 7,
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ name, ncol = 4) +
  coord_sf() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Tracking Data by Elephant",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
    size = 80,
    face = "bold",
    margin = margin(b = 40)
  ),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5,hjust = 0.5, size = 30),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(),
    axis.line.y = element_line(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 40),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 40),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 1.4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(linewidth = 0.7),
    panel.spacing = unit(10, "lines")
  )

g3

```

```{r}

```
